stemHtml: In the cockpit, one pilot is from Ireland and another from the US. They both therefore speak English natively. How will the use of social language instead of professional language affect their performance during an emergency situation?

options.a: The use of social language will make information transfer more detailed.
options.b: The use of social language could interrupt communications during an emergency.
options.c: The use of social language can improve efficiency.
options.d: The pilots are able to become more aware of the other pilot's culture.
